summary: Faster trading, panel dock, unified panel management, Company Info panel, and reliability fixes.
release_notes: Order placement is now near-instant — the server returns in ~150ms and all fill/status updates stream via WebSocket in real time.
TP/SL bracket orders are only sent after the entry order fills — prevents TWS from rejecting brackets as accidental shorts/longs when using limit orders.
Cancelled and ApiCancelled orders now appear correctly in the orders table after a server restart.
Dock trading terminal to panels — new '📋 Panels' option overlays the terminal centered on top of the panel columns. Auto-undocks when panel count drops to a single column.
Docking transitions are seamless — no flash or jump when switching between chart and panel dock modes.
All panels (Alert Feed, Scanners, Company Info, News) are managed from Settings → Panels with drag-to-reorder and remove.
New Company Info panel in the left column — shows KPIs, financials, and AI summary for the active chart ticker. News and Company Info panels can be linked to any chart slot.
Company Info now uses IB fundamental data instead of Yahoo — eliminates the Yahoo/curl_cffi dependency entirely.
Panel changes in Settings are previewed live and reverted on cancel.
Add Panel dropdown opens above the button, hides already-added panels, and caps at 8 options.
Reset to Default button added in each settings section.
All inline scanner filters now support min–max ranges (Chg%, Gap%, RVol, Float).
Day P&L and balance now use your account's base currency instead of hardcoded USD.
High of Day respects the chart timezone toggle (ET/LCL).
Fixed Level 2 depth freezing — server detects stale TWS subscriptions and auto-re-subscribes. Stale depth snapshots are skipped to prevent one-tick flash of old data.
Fixed position display flickering after fills — optimistically-zeroed positions are protected from stale API data for 5 seconds.
Release Notes moved to a standalone page accessible from the account dropdown.
Help page expanded with column explanations, filter docs, badges reference, and Chg% vs Gap% breakdown.
Disconnected overlay now displays above the trading terminal and all modals. Help and Release Notes are hidden when offline.
Share card auto-refreshes when new trades arrive while the modal is open.
Panel columns show a visible scrollbar and the drag handle no longer pushes charts off screen.
